query:
WITH dk AS (
                INSERT INTO debounce_key (job_id, key)
                VALUES ($1, $2)
                ON CONFLICT (key)
                DO UPDATE SET
                    previous_job_id = debounce_key.job_id,
                    job_id = EXCLUDED.job_id,
                    debounced_times = debounce_key.debounced_times + 1
                RETURNING
                    debounced_times,
                    first_started_at,
                    previous_job_id AS job_id_to_debounce
            ), _batch AS (
                INSERT INTO v2_job_debounce_batch (id, debounce_batch)
                SELECT
                    $1,
                    COALESCE(
                        (SELECT debounce_batch FROM v2_job_debounce_batch WHERE id = dk.job_id_to_debounce LIMIT 1),
                        nextval('debounce_batch_seq')
                    )
                FROM dk
            )
            SELECT debounced_times, first_started_at, job_id_to_debounce FROM dk
